content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.38% with mixed sector action — Realty/Pharma/Energy leading, IT weak. VIX elevated at 18.5 indicates choppy conditions. Book is well-deployed at 52% with broad sector spread; priority is risk management on existing positions rather than fresh adds with 1h 45m left in session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6.2% with CMP 1045 fading from 1057 high. Trail SL from 1025 to 1030 (still 1.4% below CMP, well above breakeven 984). Tightening locks in ~4.7% gain minimum while leaving room for normal chop. Bullish thesis intact (Q4 beat, Goldman/MS upgrades). Trail-gap discipline: 1030 is 1.4% below CMP 1045 — safely above the 0.5% floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9% with new 52-week high 1748.60 today (broke prior 1672 high). FY26 record numbers, MOFSL Rs 1,900 target, April cargo +15% YoY. Trail SL from 1710 to 1715 (above entry 1700 — locked breakeven+). 1715 is 0.7% below CMP 1726 — meets trail-gap discipline. Target 1790 still ~3.7% above CMP gives ~5.4:1.5 R:R from here."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4% (small). Current SL 23.85 already at near-breakeven (vs entry 23.65). CMP 23.99-24.01. Tightening further would bring SL above the 0.5% trail-gap floor (0.5% of 24 = ~0.12, so SL must be ≤23.87). Existing 23.85 is right at that boundary — hold as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.3%, CMP 122.22 vs SL 119 (2.6% buffer). Macro hedge thesis intact — gold structurally bullish on CB buying, Fed easing path. SL has not been triggered; let it work. Tightening here would defeat the hedge purpose."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%. Made fresh 52w high 1600 today before fading hard to 1530 — outside-day reversal on 4.2x volume is a warning, but SL at 1510 (1.5% below CMP) gives breathing room. Q4 results May 14 is a binary catalyst — within 10 days but not in next 3 sessions per Rule 11, so HOLD is acceptable. Will reassess as event approaches; if still held by May 11, will tighten or exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.3% with CMP 13463 just above SL 13400 (0.5% buffer — tight). Today's intraday is brutal: gapped to 13976 high then collapsed to 13461 (-3.7% from high). However thesis intact: record April sales +33% YoY, GST tailwind. SL is appropriately tight, let it work. Will not tighten further — already at risk-budget edge."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.3%, CMP 205.65 vs SL 204 (0.8% buffer). Q4 PAT +69% YoY thesis intact, made 52w high 212.66 earlier today before fading. 8.2x volume on the day suggests rotation, not breakdown. SL appropriate. Hold and monitor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%, CMP 4551 vs SL 4480 (1.6% buffer). Strong intraday move +4.34% on F414 GE engine deal news. Citi target 5560. Faded from 4590 high to 4540 — modest profit taking, not breakdown. SL appropriate; let it run toward target 4790."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3% (just entered). CMP 507 vs SL 500 (1.4% buffer). Realty sector leader today +3.29%. Too early to trail. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, CMP 369.65 vs SL 365 (1.3% buffer). Q4 results May 6 — that IS within 3 trading sessions, triggering Rule 11. However position is already small (~5% of capital, INR 48,650) and SL is already tight at 1.3%. This satisfies Rule 11(c) — position is already at the size threshold. Hold with current tight SL acting as the binary-event tail cap."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in gains; SL raised from 1025 to 1030, 1.4% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "New 52w high; trail SL above entry to lock breakeven+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at trail-gap boundary; no further tightening possible without self-stopout risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge thesis intact; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Outside-day reversal noted but SL at 1510 doing its job; will revisit pre-May 14 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already tight at 13400; thesis intact despite intraday reversal."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL appropriate; Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong day on F414 deal; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered; SL at 500 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 6 within 3 sessions; position size ~5% capital + tight SL satisfies Rule 11(c) event-trade sizing."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL (+10.3% on Q4 beat) and RRKABEL noted but extended; would prefer pullback entries. SUNPHARMA, LAURUSLABS — pharma momentum names to watch for cleaner setups. KOTAKBANK post-results dip below 200DMA — wait for stabilization. Power cluster (CESC/ADANIPOWER) — already exposed via existing book themes; will not stack. RELIANCE constructive but Q4 PAT decline limits conviction; need cleaner break above 1465.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-positioned at 52% deployed across 10 positions spanning Financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), Auto (MARUTI, EXIDEIND), Defence (HAL), Realty (ANANTRAJ), Energy/Logistics (ADANIPORTS, GESHIP), and ETF hedges (GOLDBEES, PHARMABEES). With VIX elevated at 18.5 and 1h 45m to close, priority is trailing winners (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS) and letting the rest run to defined SLs. No new entries today — existing book has enough thematic exposure and several names (EXIDEIND May 6, GESHIP May 14) approach binary events that need active management next sessions. EXIDEIND specifically flagged for Rule 11 monitoring — May 6 results in 2 trading days."
}
